main.title: Middle East Tensions Escalate as Talks Continue
main.summary: Overnight developments have intensified diplomatic pressure across global capitals. International mediators are attempting to de-escalate the situation while humanitarian agencies report rising displacement.

breaking: Oil prices surge as global markets react to geopolitical uncertainty.

nigeria.title: Nigeria Introduces New Economic Stability Measures
nigeria.summary: Federal authorities unveiled reforms aimed at reducing inflation and stabilizing the currency amid global pressure.

america.title: US Congress Debates Foreign Policy Strategy
america.summary: Lawmakers discussed diplomatic and security responses to rising global tensions.

europe.title: EU Leaders Call for Immediate Ceasefire
europe.summary: European officials held emergency meetings urging restraint and humanitarian access.

sport.title: CAF Announces New Tournament Dates
sport.summary: Fixture schedules adjusted due to international travel concerns.

business.title: Energy Stocks Rise Amid Oil Price Jump
business.summary: Energy sector shares gained as crude prices climbed during global uncertainty.
